description: CompositionPurple printed top made of 100% polyester, fully lined, has a scooped neck, sleeveless with ruffles at the arm opening and a sash at the waistFitBlouse fitWash careDelicate machine wash using a mild detergentDo not bleach or tumble dryCool ironThis top is made of polyester - giving smoothness, lustre, drape and easy-care practicality. The purple background with multi-coloured print turns this simple top into a wardrobe favourite. Wear this with a skirt and stilettos or jeans and sneakers.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
